title: Other annual license taxes not required
doc_html:
§2813.  Other annual license taxes not required

Licensed chiropractors and interns shall not be required to pay any annual license fee or tax except as provided in R.S. 37:2809(A).  

Added by Acts 1974, No. 39, §1.
